channel.title: OSSTMM on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in OSSTMM on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003): Engagement Management
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Engagement Management" , "Scoping" , "Reporting" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Threat Modeling" , "Security Testing" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master engagement management for the CompTIA PenTest+ PT0-003 exam. Learn pre-engagement activities, agreement types, the shared responsibility model, testing frameworks, threat modeling, and reporting.

item.title: A Comprehensive Beginner's Guide to Penetration Testing Tools & Techniques
item.category: "penetration testing" , "cybersecurity" , "ethical hacking" , "tools" , "techniques" , "beginner's guide" , "Nmap" , "Metasploit" , "Wireshark" , "Burp Suite" , "OSSTMM" , "PTES" , "OWASP" , "CEH" , "OSCP" , "GPEN" , "security testing" , "vulnerability assessment" , "network security" , "information security"
item.description: Learn the essentials of penetration testing tools and techniques, methodologies, and certifications to kickstart your career in cybersecurity.
